metadata.description: Benchmark-driven local ASR for Apple Silicon — plugins for context ingestion and SRT proofreading

plugins.name: bestasr
plugins.description: Agent workflows for bestASR: transcribe any source to SRT (transcript), distill documents into context.json (context-ingest), and proofread SRT transcripts against context with immutable timecodes (srt-proofread). The skills drive the bestasr CLI (install via scripts/install.sh).
